revision.comment: No need to track this legitimate, documented usage. This category was re-added without discussion, and it appears to not be useful or needed.
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}
{{{1}}}

{{{1}}}

{{{1}}}
==== Usage ==== Some {{right|right-aligned words}} in text. Produces:
  Some
right-aligned words
  in text. [[Category:typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Formatting templates|Right]] [[ja:Template:Right]]

revision.comment: Robot - Speedily moving category Formatting templates to Wikipedia formatting templates per [[WP:CFD|CFD]].

revision.text:
{{{1}}}
==== Usage ==== Some {{right|right-aligned words}} in text. Produces:
  Some {{right|right-aligned words}}  in text. [[Category:Typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Right]] [[cy:Nodyn:Right]] [[fr:Modèle:Droite]] [[mk:Шаблон:Right]] [[ml:ഫലകം:Right]] [[ja:Template:Right]] [[or:ଛାଞ୍ଚ:Right]] [[ta:வார்ப்புரு:Right]]

{{{1}}}

revision.comment: [[Category:Pages using right with no input arguments]] and update to match [[Template:left]]
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using right with no input arguments]] }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

|style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using right with no input arguments]] }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Right]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]; thousands of transclusions ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |{{{1|}}} |style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using right with no input arguments]] }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |{{{1|}}} |style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using right with no input arguments]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |{{{1|}}} |style="text-align:right"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using right with no input arguments]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
